stories.title: 🤗 Trending: meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: The story highlights the trending status of the Meta-Llama-3-8B model on Hugging Face Benchmarks.
It is categorized under key AI/ML topics including 'transformers', 'llama', and 'text-generation'.
This indicates ongoing community interest and benchmarking activity around Meta's latest large language models.

stories.title: 🤗 Trending: meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: The story highlights the trending status of the Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct model on Hugging Face Benchmarks.
It pertains to the text-generation pipeline, indicating its use in large language model applications.
The associated tags (transformers, llama, safetensors) confirm its relevance within the modern NLP/AI ecosystem.

stories.title: Google appeals search monopoly ruling, says it won business ‘fair and square’
stories.author: Lauren Feiner
bullet_points: Google is appealing a federal ruling that labeled it an illegal search monopolist.
The company argues the ruling bypassed legal standards and that it won in the marketplace fairly.
The appeal follows a recent decision regarding Google's search practices.

stories.title: Waymo suspends freeway driving amid safety concerns
stories.author: Andrew J. Hawkins
bullet_points: Waymo has suspended freeway driving across all its US markets due to safety concerns.
Customers noticed the service change when their trips were rerouted to local roads.
This represents a significant operational pullback for a leading autonomous vehicle provider.

stories.title: 🤗 Trending: deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: The news highlights the trending status of the 'deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1' model on Hugging Face Benchmarks.
The model is categorized under text-generation and conversational AI pipelines.
It utilizes standard ML components such as transformers and safetensors, indicating its integration into the broader LLM ecosystem.

stories.title: 🤗 Trending: bigscience/bloom
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: The news highlights the 'bigscience/bloom' model on Hugging Face Benchmarks.
The associated pipeline is 'text-generation', indicating its primary function.
Key technologies involved include transformers, PyTorch, and safetensors.

stories.title: Ollama is now powered by MLX on Apple Silicon in preview
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: Ollama, a popular local LLM runner, has integrated support for MLX.
This integration specifically targets Apple Silicon hardware for optimized performance.
The feature is currently available in a preview build, indicating ongoing development.

stories.title: ollama launch
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: Ollama introduces a new command for running coding tools locally or in the cloud.
It supports various coding models such as Claude Code, OpenCode, and Codex.
A key feature is its simplicity, requiring no environment variables or configuration files.

stories.title: OpenAI gpt-oss-safeguard
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: Ollama is integrating OpenAI's gpt-oss-safeguard reasoning models for safety classification tasks.
The models are available in two sizes (20B and 120B) and are permissively licensed under Apache 2.0.
The partnership involves Ollama, OpenAI, and ROOST (Robust Open Online Safety Tools).

stories.title: Meta’s Forum is part Reddit, part Facebook, and part Google AI Overview
stories.author: Stevie Bonifield
bullet_points: Meta is launching a new 'Forum' app to house Facebook Groups, consolidating functionality into a dedicated platform.
The app integrates a dedicated AI chatbot, signaling Meta's push to embed generative AI directly into social features.
This move positions Meta's offering as a direct competitor to AI-driven search experiences like Google's AI Overview and ChatGPT.

stories.title: OpenClaw
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: OpenClaw is a personal AI assistant designed to integrate with messaging applications.
It connects users to local AI coding agents.
A key feature is that all AI processing runs entirely on the user's local device for privacy.

stories.title: Image generation (experimental)
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: Ollama now supports local image generation capabilities on macOS.
This feature allows users to run image generation models entirely on their local machines.
Support for Windows and Linux platforms is planned for future releases.

stories.title: Claude Code with Anthropic API compatibility
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: Ollama now supports the Anthropic Messages API.
This integration allows users to leverage models like Claude Code within the Ollama ecosystem.
It bridges the gap between open-source local models and proprietary API capabilities.

stories.title: OpenAI Codex with Ollama
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: Ollama enables the use of OpenAI's Codex CLI with open-source models.
Codex functionality allows models to read, modify, and execute code locally.
The integration supports various open-weight alternatives like gpt-oss:20b and gpt-oss:120b.

stories.title: Google’s AI search is so broken it can ‘disregard’ what you’re looking for
stories.author: Jay Peters
bullet_points: Google's new AI Overviews feature is exhibiting functional errors.
The AI is reportedly failing to provide accurate summaries for specific queries, such as 'disregard'.
The issue suggests current AI implementations are prone to unpredictable and sometimes nonsensical outputs.

stories.title: Four Russian satellites are now within striking distance of an ICEYE radarsat
stories.author: Stephen Clark
bullet_points: Four Russian satellites are reportedly close enough to threaten an ICEYE radarsat.
The proximity and capability of these satellites are noted as unusual for standard mission profiles.
The story touches upon geopolitical tensions intersecting with advanced space technology.

stories.title: US scrambles to stop Internet users re-creating dead pilots’ voices
stories.author: Jeremy Hsu
bullet_points: The story concerns the unauthorized recreation of deceased pilots' voices using technology.
This activity involves a workaround that circumvents existing NTSB regulations regarding cockpit audio disclosure.
It highlights the intersection of advanced voice synthesis AI and aviation safety/privacy concerns.

stories.title: A blueprint for formal verification of Apple corecrypto
stories.author: security.apple.com via typesanitizer
bullet_points: The article discusses a blueprint for formally verifying Apple's core cryptography.
Formal verification is a rigorous mathematical technique used to prove software correctness, suggesting a high level of security focus.
This topic is highly technical and relevant to cybersecurity and low-level systems engineering within the tech industry.

stories.title: How I Built a Local, Multimodal Gemma 4 Visual Regression & Patch Agent: Closed-Loop Validation, Canvas Pixel Diffing, and Reproducible Benchmarks
stories.author: kanyingidickson-dev
bullet_points: The article details the creation of a local, multimodal agent utilizing Gemma 4 for visual regression and patch detection.
It focuses on advanced techniques like closed-loop validation and canvas pixel diffing for rigorous testing.
The work contributes to the Gemma 4 Challenge, emphasizing reproducible benchmarking in AI model evaluation.
